blockers.description: backend/.env contains secrets — must NEVER be committed
blockers.workaround: File is gitignored; stage only specific files

blockers.description: npm install fails on WSL with NTFS EACCES permission error
blockers.workaround: Run npm install from native Linux path or use Docker

human_actions_pending.action: Run 5 UAT items in 03-HUMAN-UAT.md: build, visual render, card stats with live data, bar color, connect project E2E
human_actions_pending.context: Phase 3 verification is human_needed — automated checks pass but visual/data flow requires manual testing with running backend+frontend

decisions.decision: Atlassian OAuth 2.0 (3LO) over Basic Auth modal
decisions.rationale: Required for future API access + better UX

decisions.decision: Token encrypted with Fernet at rest in SQLite oauth_tokens table
Dashboard shows only Bug and Bug Task issues — no subtasks
decisions.rationale: User explicitly requested: display Bug/Bug Task only, no child tickets

decisions.decision: Jira Cloud API pagination via nextPageToken cursor, not startAt offset
decisions.rationale: POST /search/jql returns HTTP 400 on startAt; only nextPageToken supported

decisions.decision: No Recharts — Phase 3 has no pie charts
decisions.rationale: UI redesigned to match dashboard.html which has no charts at all

decisions.decision: Per-card inline stats: OPEN BUGS + CRITICAL counts from GET /api/bugs/{project_key}
decisions.rationale: Matches dashboard.html design — each card fetches its own stats in parallel on mount

decisions.decision: Colored left bar: red (#dc2626) if critical > 0, green (#065b41) if critical = 0

decisions.rationale: CSS Modules pattern; all new styles go here
critical = bugs with status != done AND priority critical/highest — prevents resolved bugs inflating the critical counter

decisions.decision: Kebab menu as sibling button (wrapper div + absolute position)
decisions.rationale: Project cards are <button> — nested <button> is invalid HTML; wrapper div + sibling button solves it cleanly
User preference — hover-only was too hard to discover for QA users

decisions.decision: Privacy-by-default project search (no auto-load on mount)
decisions.rationale: Prevents leaking full Jira project list; user must type before results appear
total is unfiltered — all synced bugs regardless of status/priority; matches dashboard.html mockup layout

decisions.decision: Single /dashboard route with conditional rendering (3-way ternary: loadingProjects / projects.length===0 / has-projects)
decisions.rationale: Eliminates flash-of-wrong-state and removes need for navigation on delete

decisions.decision: connectSection overflow:hidden removed; border-radius distributed to child panels
decisions.rationale: overflow:hidden on the section was clipping the absolutely-positioned add-project dropdown
Ensures sticky navbar stacking context paints above animated page content stacking contexts

next_action: Commit DashboardPage.module.css dropdown fixes, then run human UAT (5 items in 03-HUMAN-UAT.md).
context_notes: Phase 3 UI is complete + polished. Animations, overlay dropdowns, and dropdown-clipping fixes all done. One uncommitted file: DashboardPage.module.css (topnav overflow/z-index + connectSection overflow removal). Human UAT is the only gate. After UAT: fix 3 CR blockers, mark phase complete, begin Phase 4.
